items.nameZh: 風域專家・能源資料分析師
items.positivePrompt: Original fictional Advanced Energy Data Analyst for an offshore-wind strategy card game; full-body character key art, neutral confident stance, head-to-toe visible; 冷靜、精確、重視證據; carrying data terminal and policy dashboard; professional technical attire with task-appropriate PPE, institution-free insignia; navy, ivory, muted gold; Taiwan-Strait-inspired maritime environment; cinematic semi-realistic anime aesthetic with luminous atmospheric lighting, naturalistic faces, meticulous industrial detail, realistic proportions and PPE; vertical 2:3 full-bleed composition; keep face, hands and essential tools inside a 12 percent safe zone; source artwork only, designed for a separate runtime card-frame overlay; no resemblance to any real person or institution.
